name: @ge/redaction
description: The redaction module every live-system capture passes through BEFORE any byte reaches disk (Phase 2 of docs/plans/real-system-twins/): policy-driven masking/dropping/hashing of headers and body fields (headers default-deny for credentials), built-in PII detectors, and a reviewable redaction report that says what was removed and by which rule. Safety-critical: behavior changes must show up as golden-fixture diffs (src/fixtures/). Pure and dependency-free; no IO.
